name: Slopey
author: Poki
description: Slopey is a online skill game where you have to control a ball and steer it over a downhill track. The game is inspired by the hit game Slope. In this game you cruise down a random slope and try not to fall off. Your ball will speed up as you get further and further. Slopey might looks simple but is anything but. Be sure to capture gems as you go in order to unlock new skins. Check in every so often for free gems as well. You can play Slopey on Poki in your browser on mobile and desktop devices. How to play? Steer ball - Left/Right Arrow Who created Slopey? Slopey is created by Yello Games. They are also the creators behind Tricks , Jet Speed, and more.
